hero.title: This year, the weekend never happened.
hero.subtitle: So we’re building it from memory.
hero.body: Every Defqon, every stage, every moment we ever took home. Add yours, in your own language.

wall.emptyBody: be one of the first to leave a moment here.
wall.liveFeed: {n, plural, one {# moment} other {# moments}} just landed
wall.lostEditionSub: the wall remembers the edition that never opened
wall.gathering2026Sub: The Gathering happened — but the weekend never came. If you have photos from that day, they're the only 2026 there is. Add them to the wall.

report.thanks: thank you — we’ll take a look.

upload.title: add your moment
upload.dropHint: up to 5 photos or GIFs, 10MB each — drag & drop works too
upload.embedHint: a short moment you filmed — not a full-set recording
upload.igInvalid: letters, numbers, dots and underscores only
upload.igNotProfile: that’s a post link — paste your profile URL instead
upload.countryNoMatch: no match — try a different spelling
upload.rightsLabel: I captured this myself and have the right to share it
upload.doneBody: this moment is yours — with the private link below you can take it down anytime.

errors.unsupported: photos and GIFs only — link videos instead
errors.needFiles: pick at least one photo, or link a video
errors.badEmbed: that doesn’t look like a YouTube link
errors.failed: something went wrong — nothing was posted. try again.

takedown.confirmBody: this hides it from the wall immediately. this cannot be undone from here.
takedown.done: it’s down. thank you for being part of the wall.
takedown.invalid: this link is not valid — the moment may already be gone.

footer.disclaimer: Unofficial fan project — not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Q-dance / Defqon.1.

passport.title: festival passport
passport.startTitle: start anonymously — just pick a name
passport.noneChecked: tap the editions you were there for.
passport.stampHint: tap a stamp to mark editions you attended · red = a canceled year
passport.noMoments: no moments yet — your uploads will gather here.
passport.signOut: leave this passport on this device
passport.keepHint: connect an email or google account — your passport opens on any device and survives this browser.
passport.otherDeviceHint: open this passport on any device — connect with the same account there.
passport.signInHint: sign in with the email or google account you connected.
passport.switchWarning: stamps made on this device will stay behind — sign in anyway?
passport.deleteConfirm: this permanently deletes your passport, stamps and connection. moments you shared stay on the wall — anonymized, each with its own delete link. continue?
passport.emailInUse: that email is already connected to another passport
passport.googleInUse: that google account is already connected to another passport
passport.noPassport: no passport found for this email
passport.badCode: that code didn't work — check it and try again
passport.rateLimited: too many emails — try again in a minute

policies.enNotice: The English text is the binding version.
